Meaning.En: An official stamp or document issued by a country’s government, placed in a passport, that allows the holder to enter, stay for a specified time, and sometimes work in that country.
Meaning.Example: She applied for a tourist visa before her trip to Japan.

Situation.Vi: Người du lịch xin visa tại lãnh sự quán trước khi đi nước ngoài.
Situation.En: A traveler applies for a visa at a consulate before traveling abroad.

Situation.Vi: Cận cảnh nhân viên hải quan kiểm tra visa trong hộ chiếu.
Situation.En: Closer look at a customs officer checking the visa in a passport.

Meaning.En: To officially approve and stamp a passport with a visa, allowing entry into a country.
Meaning.Example: The embassy will visa your passport within two business days.

Situation.Vi: Lãnh sự quán đóng dấu visa vào hộ chiếu của bạn sau khi xét duyệt hồ sơ.
Situation.En: The consulate stamps your passport with a visa after reviewing your application.
